## Type of change

## Testing

- [ ] `pytest -m "not slow"` (backend changes)
- [ ] `pytest -m corpus` (retrieval/CARP/citation changes)
- [ ] `npm run build` (frontend changes)
- [ ] Eval harness run (if applicable): <!-- command + result -->

## Security & data

- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or `.picard-data/` in the diff

## Accessibility (UI changes only)

- [ ] Keyboard navigation works on affected flows
- [ ] Focus states visible and logical
- [ ] Form controls have labels; errors are readable
- [ ] Color is not the only indicator of meaning
- [ ] Screen reader spot-check performed (VoiceOver/NVDA)
